components.name: WorkOrderQueue
components.purpose: Present dense field-work priorities while preserving actionable exception state, accountable ownership, and status history.
content_limits: Show the block name before internal work-order ID
Do not truncate blocker reason below two visible lines
Display acreage with one decimal place
components.responsive_behavior: Desktop uses aligned operational columns; narrow screens stack block, state, timing, and accountable owner without hiding the blocker.
accessibility: Status is expressed by text and icon in addition to color
Current state is announced before supporting metadata
Touch targets are at least 44 by 44 CSS pixels
components.error_behavior: An unresolved reference displays an explicit data-integrity state and disables consequential actions.
